MizzyDT 06/09/2024 06:20

Boing Bingus 06/09/2024 06:24
"Marvin SML." He says, his reflection on the moon. The camera pans downwards to a cloaked flowerboy, walking with his face down. It cuts to a front shot, the wind blowing the cloak hiding half his face as he says "you took my body, my face, my life, you took it." "All because I pissed in that fucking bush." He says as he shows his hand, vines growing out of it. It goes back to the side shot of him walking. "Because of the dmca, you took everything from me." He then stops, arriving at a door. "And for what?" He says, the camera panning onto his back the house looking over him. Camera cuts to Marvin, facing the camera, as he looks over his shoulder to see Flowerboy saying, "For me to take it all back, bitch." Camera cuts again to a black void, flowerboy facing 3/4s away from it, as he says "y'know what?" He turns and steps to a sideviee, growing vines again from his arm. "Now I'm gonna piss on you." He says slashing the camera with his hand, to be transitioned as gameplay.

"Marvin SML." He says, his reflection on the moon. The camera pans downwards to a cloaked flowerboy, walking with his face down. It cuts to a front shot, the wind blowing the cloak hiding half his face as he says "you took my body, my face, my life, you took it." "All because I pissed in that fucking bush." He says as he shows his hand, vines growing out of it. It goes back to the side shot of him walking. "Because of the dmca, you took everything from me." He then stops, arriving at a door. Camera cuts to Marvin, facing the camera, as he looks over his shoulder to see Flowerboy saying, "For me to take it all back, bitch."
